ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., BMW, Toyota) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., 1 Series, Camry) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "engine_fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type used by the engine */,
  "engine_hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "engine_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., MANUAL, AUTOMATIC) */,
  "driven_wheels" TEXT /* Type of driven wheels (e.g., rear wheel drive, all wheel drive) */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "market_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market category */,
  "vehicle_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle size */,
  "vehicle_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle style */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "vehicle_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_style_id") REFERENCES vehicle_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_size_id") REFERENCES vehicle_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_fuel_type_id") REFERENCES engine_fuel_types ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_market_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "market_code" TEXT /* Code for the market (e.g., NA for North America) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being sold */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the sale took place */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_vehicles" (
  "customer_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-vehicle pair */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_vehicles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of loyalty program (e.g., points, rewards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-loyalty pair */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer enrolling in the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Current points balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_loyalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "sales_figure" INTEGER /* Sales figure for the trend */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_members_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segmentation" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_segmentation_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)
